title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
author: Koray Kavukcuoglu CTO, Google DeepMind and Chief AI Architect, Google
raw_description: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
summary: 谷歌在I/O大会上发布Gemini 3.5系列模型，结合前沿智能与行动能力，是重要的模型更新。
analysis_note: 顶级模型发布，技术突破显著，但描述简短，缺乏具体细节。
